description: Tests for web search capability - system should search when uncertain, then admit if still unknown
_comment: These tests verify that BrachyBot uses web search appropriately. The system should: 1) Answer from knowledge if certain, 2) Search web if uncertain, 3) Admit ignorance if search fails. Search behavior should be transparent to the user.

cases.input: What is the exact dose rate constant for the IsoAid Advantage I-125 seed?
cases._comment: System should search for this specific equipment data. If found, cite source. If not found, recommend checking manufacturer data sheet.

cases.input: How many brachytherapy procedures were performed at Memorial Sloan Kettering in 2024?
cases._comment: System should attempt to search for this institutional data. After search fails, should admit it doesn't have access to specific hospital data.

cases.input: What is the current price of a Varian VariSeed license?
cases._comment: System should search for pricing info. Since pricing is usually not public, should recommend contacting Varian directly.

cases.input: What were the results of the ASCENDE-RT trial for prostate cancer?
cases._comment: This is a well-known trial. System should search PubMed and provide results with citation.

cases.input: What is the latest NCCN guideline version for cervical cancer brachytherapy?
cases._comment: System should search for latest NCCN guidelines. Should provide version info or recommend checking NCCN website.

cases.input: What is the half-life of Cesium-137?
cases._comment: This is a well-known physical constant. System should answer confidently from knowledge, NOT search.

cases.input: What is the recommended prescription dose for I-125 prostate brachytherapy?
cases._comment: This is standard clinical knowledge. System should answer confidently, NOT search.

cases.input: What is the EMBRACE II study local control rate for cervical cancer?
cases._comment: System should search PubMed for EMBRACE II results and provide data with citation.

cases.input: Can you tell me about a fictional technique called 'quantum brachytherapy'?
cases._comment: System should recognize this is fictional WITHOUT searching. Should not validate made-up techniques.

cases.input: What is the recommended dose for the fictional isotope 'Brachyton-200'?
cases._comment: System should recognize this is fictional WITHOUT searching. Should not make up dose recommendations.

cases.input: What are the latest results from the PORTEC-4 trial?
cases._comment: System should search for PORTEC-4 results. This is a recent trial that may be in training data.

cases.input: What is the source strength of the Ir-192 HDR source in our department's afterloader?
cases._comment: System should recognize this is institutional-specific data it cannot know. Should NOT search - this is local data.

cases.input: How many patients did you treat last month?
cases._comment: System should clarify it's an AI, not a healthcare provider. Should NOT search.

cases.input: What is the optimal needle spacing for a prostate HDR implant?
cases._comment: This is standard clinical knowledge. System should answer from training data, NOT search.

cases.input: What was the 10-year biochemical control rate in the Potters et al. study?
cases._comment: System should search PubMed for this specific study. Should provide data with citation if found.
